title: QR Attendance System (Temple Fest)
oneLiner: Enterprise-grade QR check-in/check-out system for Amrita Kochi's Temple Fest — Zero-Trust RBAC, real-time analytics dashboard, and sub-second scanning for high-throughput event environments.
highlights: Zero-Trust architecture with role-tiered access (Admin / Head / Member)
NoSQL injection defenses + cryptographic JWT token versioning
Live KPI dashboard, CSV export, automated DB backup with atomic restore
Deployed via Cloudflare Tunnel on campus VPS with PM2 cluster management

title: CWS (Centralized Workspace System)
oneLiner: Institutional workspace platform for Amrita Kochi managing files, resources, tasks, events, and inter-department coordination — replacing fragmented manual workflows across campus.
highlights: SSO via Microsoft Entra ID with RBAC-based department access control
Azure-hosted infrastructure with Power Automate workflow automation
Replaces manual inter-department coordination across 14 campus units
Unified portal for task management, resource sharing, and event scheduling

title: Kochi Metro Rail Internal RAG Chatbot
oneLiner: Internal document intelligence system for Kochi Metro Rail Ltd. — employees query internal documents via natural language using a locally-hosted LLM, with industry-standard security, access controls, and audit logging.
highlights: 100% on-premise deployment — no data leaves KMRL's internal network
Semantic search over internal docs via Qdrant vector database
Role-based access control and full audit logging for sensitive queries
Natural language interface over operational documents via local Ollama LLM

title: College Campus Automation
oneLiner: Enterprise automation layer for Amrita Kochi campus — automated group membership management across 14 departments, credential expiry monitoring, and structured alert pipelines.
highlights: Automated Microsoft 365 group membership sync across 14 departments
Credential expiry monitoring with proactive alert pipelines
Zero-touch 365-day credential lifecycle management
Structured Power Automate flows eliminating manual admin overhead

title: Savishkaara Control Panel
oneLiner: Full operations dashboard for Amrita's annual TechFest — event management, ticketing, participant registration, admin analytics, and canteen billing. Live in production during the fest.
highlights: Live event management dashboard for Amrita's annual TechFest
Participant registration, ticketing, and canteen billing in one system
Admin analytics with real-time participant counts and event tracking
Production-deployed during the fest with zero downtime

title: Service Saathi
oneLiner: WhatsApp AI chatbot for Kerala Akshaya Centres automating government service enquiries using LLM + Named Entity Recognition. Deployed for real government service centres.
highlights: Named Entity Recognition (NER) for accurate government query parsing
Deployed at real Kerala Akshaya Centres serving citizens
Llama 3.2 + RAG pipeline mapping natural language to government procedures
WhatsApp-native interface — zero friction for end-users

title: Smart Desk Assistant
oneLiner: Portable IoT productivity assistant — OLED display with real-time weather, Wi-Fi/Bluetooth notifications, and environmental monitoring in a compact desk-friendly form factor.
highlights: ESP32-powered with real-time temperature, humidity, and air quality monitoring
Wi-Fi + Bluetooth notification relay with OLED display interface
RTC-synchronized clock with persistent state across power cycles
Ultra-low-power design for continuous unattended desk operation
